name: Tab Navigated
description: Fires when a visitor switches to a different portfolio section tab.

name: Portfolio Area Entered
description: Fires when a visitor clicks an area card to navigate to Work, Study, or Play.

name: External Link Clicked
description: Fires when a visitor opens an external link such as LinkedIn, GitHub, or a project link.

name: Film Watched On You Tube
description: Fires when a visitor clicks the Watch on YouTube button for a film.

name: Contact Email Clicked
description: Fires when a visitor clicks the email address to initiate contact.

name: Signal Orb Node Clicked
description: Fires when a visitor clicks a navigation node on the Signal Orb in the hero.

name: Project Link Clicked
description: Fires when a visitor clicks an external link on a project card.

name: Featured Film CTA Clicked
description: Fires when a visitor clicks 'See it in Play' or 'Watch on YouTube' on the featured film card.

name: Skill Group Viewed
description: Fires when a visitor scrolls the skill map section into view.

name: Contact Initiated
description: Fires when a visitor clicks the phone number link to contact via phone.
